summary: MASN and MASN2 24/7 feed - DAI requests stop after exiting a stream
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for MASN
AND the user launches the MLB.tv Core App
AND the user logs in
AND the user has initiated playback of the 24/7 MASN feeds

*NOTE:* 
MASN entitlement = MASN_110 and MASN_120

MASN Test users:

|Username|Password|
|masn@gmail.com|Password4MASN|
|masnims@gmail.com (In Market)|Password4MASN|
|masnoom@gmail.com (Out of Market)|Password4MASN|
|masnintl@gmail.com (International)|Password4MASN|

steps.action: WHEN a user exits the MASN 24/7 live stream
steps.result:
THEN video playback is dismissed
AND "id3-events.json" network calls to [dai.google.com|http://dai.google.com] are no longer occurring

**NOTE:** Entering "stream" into the Network search of Dev Tools should filter out the id3-events.json network calls

steps.action: WHEN a user exits the MASN2 24/7 live stream
steps.result:
THEN video playback is dismissed
AND "id3-events.json" network calls to [dai.google.com|http://dai.google.com] are no longer occurring

**NOTE:** Entering "stream" into the Network search of Dev Tools should filter out the id3-events.json network calls
